task_completion.description: Open the 4StoreyBuilding model and navigate to the DHW Plant components.
task_completion.visual_evidence: eQUEST interface is open with the 4StoreyBuilding project loaded. The Water-Side HVAC view or Component Tree is visible, showing the DHW Plant.

task_completion.description: Locate and open the properties for the DW-HEATER component.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A properties dialog box or spreadsheet view specifically for the DW-HEATER component (named 'DHW Plant 1 Wtr Htr (1)') is open and visible.
The Heat Input Ratio (or equivalent efficiency/HIR field) in the water heater properties is explicitly set to 1.05263.
The Tank UA (or standby loss/UA field) in the water heater properties is explicitly set to 3.0 (changed from the baseline of 3.66391).
The Aquastat Setpoint (or Hot Water Supply Temp field) in the water heater properties is explicitly set to 125.

task_completion.description: Save the project and run the annual simulation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A simulation progress window, a successful simulation completion dialog, or the eQUEST simulation output viewer is visible, indicating the simulation was executed.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the eQUEST graphical interface to make changes rather than editing the .inp file in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the eQUEST application windows, component trees, and dialogs, not a text editor like Notepad, VSCode, or Vim.

integrity.description: Verify the simulation was actually executed within the eQUEST application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The eQUEST simulation dialog box or calculation progress bar is visible, rather than just a terminal command or a fake output file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent manually entered the parameters into the component properties.
integrity.visual_evidence: Step-by-step navigation and data entry into the eQUEST property dialogs is visible, rather than downloading or copying a pre-made project file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target model is '4StoreyBuilding'. The specific component to modify is the DW-HEATER named 'DHW Plant 1 Wtr Htr (1)'. The target parameters are: HEAT-INPUT-RATIO = 1.05263 (representing 95% thermal efficiency), TANK-UA = 3.0, and AQUASTAT-SETPT-T = 125. The baseline TANK-UA was 3.66391. The task explicitly requires running the annual simulation after saving, which is worth 15 points in the grading logic.
